The SEO Framework Codebase Map
===============================

WordPress SEO plugin focused on performance, best SEO practices, and user experience.
Automates meta tags, sitemaps, Schema.org, robots directives, and social media output.
Requires PHP 7.4+, WordPress 6.7+. Text domain: autodescription.

Files named index.php are direct-access guards (empty PHP files).
Files ending in .min.js or .min.css are minified mirrors of their source counterparts.


Root
----
.editorconfig                   Editor config: tabs (4-wide), LF endings, UTF-8, trim trailing whitespace
.gitattributes                  Line-ending normalization, binary markers, export-ignore rules for dev files
.gitignore                      Ignores archives, logs, OS artifacts, vendor/, .venv/
autodescription.php             Main plugin file: header metadata, version/path constants, bootstraps the plugin
composer.json                   Composer manifest: PHP/WP dependencies and dev tooling (PHPCS, PHP Compatibility)
cspell.json                     CSpell dictionary with project-specific allowed words
index.php                       Empty direct-access guard
license.txt                     GNU General Public License v3
phpcs.xml                       PHP_CodeSniffer ruleset configuring the custom TSF coding standard
README.md                       GitHub readme with badges (version, downloads, reviews) and ZIP download link
readme.txt                      WordPress.org plugin readme (description, FAQ, installation, changelog)
security.txt                    Security disclosure info pointing to GitHub Security Advisories
wpml-config.xml                 WPML/Polylang config declaring translatable custom fields and settings

.github/
	codemap.txt                   This file
	CONTRIBUTING.md               Contribution guidelines
	copilot-instructions.md       Repository coding standards and conventions for AI assistants
	FUNDING.yml                   GitHub Sponsors funding configuration
	instructions/                 File-scoped and task-scoped Copilot instruction files
		css.instructions.md         Auto-applied CSS instruction file for stylesheet edits
		docs.instructions.md        Auto-applied documentation instruction file for readme edits
		javascript.instructions.md  Auto-applied JavaScript instruction file for script edits
		local.instructions.md       Local-context and private workspace instruction dispatcher
		php.instructions.md         Auto-applied PHP and WordPress instruction file for PHP edits
	ISSUE_TEMPLATE/               Issue templates for bug reports and feature requests


Bootstrap (bootstrap/)
----------------------
Initialization sequence: autodescription.php loads load.php, which registers the autoloader
and hooks plugin loading. Context-specific init files wire hooks for admin, front, cron, etc.

define.php                      Defines plugin-wide constants (capabilities, debug flag, settings slug, paths, option names)
load.php                        Registers the PSR-4 autoloader, hooks plugin loading at plugins_loaded, wires activation/deactivation
load-debug.php                  Hooks debug query output and rendering to footers (loaded only when THE_SEO_FRAMEWORK_DEBUG is true)
init-admin.php                  Admin hooks: sitemap refresh, post/term meta saving, meta boxes, list columns, settings pages, scripts
init-admin-ajax.php             Registers wp_ajax_* handlers (notice dismiss, image cropping, counter updates, Gutenberg data, slug fetching)
init-compat.php                 Loads theme/plugin compatibility files by matching active themes and plugins against a known list
init-cron.php                   Hooks sitemap pre-rendering to the cron event when output and cron options are enabled
init-front.php                  Front-end setup: removes default WP head tags, registers sitemap routing, redirects, meta tags, robots headers
init-global.php                 Shared hooks: text domain, XMLRPC noindex headers, primary-term filter, robots.txt override, breadcrumb shortcode
plugin-activation.php           Activation: checks for conflicting plugins, enables options autoloading
plugin-deactivation.php         Deactivation: disables options autoloading
upgrade.php                     Incremental database migrations and version upgrades with notices


Classes (inc/classes/)
----------------------
Core class hierarchy: Load (singleton facade via tsf()) extends Pool (composite sub-object proxy)
extends Legacy_API (backward-compatible method relay). All classes use The_SEO_Framework namespace.

load.class.php                  Singleton facade accessed via tsf(); main public API entry point
pool.class.php                  Object pool holding proxied composite sub-objects (admin(), data(), etc.) with deprecation support
legacy-api.class.php            Backward-compatible API class relaying legacy method calls to new internal data APIs


Admin (inc/classes/admin/)
--------------------------
Admin UI: settings pages, meta boxes, list tables, scripts, SEO bar, and notices.

menu.class.php                  Registers the TSF admin menu page under the WordPress dashboard
notice.class.php                Renders dismissible admin notices with configurable type, icon, and escaping
plugintable.class.php           Adds action and meta links (Settings, API, etc.) to the plugin row on the Plugins screen
utils.class.php                 Admin utility methods: safe redirects with query-arg-based alerts

lists/
	poststates.class.php          Appends No Search / No Archive post-state labels to the post list table
	table.class.php               Abstract base class for post/term list table column and action setup

notice/
	persistent.class.php          Manages persistent dismissible notices that respawn until dismissed or expired

script/
	ajax.class.php                AJAX callbacks: dismiss notice, update counters, crop images, save list-edit fields
	loader.class.php              Prepares and enqueues admin JS/CSS scripts with localized states and params
	registry.class.php            Registers, outputs, and deduplicates admin script/style assets via WP_Dependencies
	utils.class.php               Entity-decoding utilities for values passed between PHP, JS, and HTML contexts

seobar/
	builder.class.php             Interprets SEO Bar test results (good/okay/bad/unknown) into rendered HTML bar items
	listtable.class.php           Adds the SEO Bar column to post/term list tables and renders output per row
	builder/
		main.class.php            Abstract base: test-runner loop and shared caching for SEO Bar builders
		page.class.php            SEO Bar assessments (title, description, indexing, etc.) for posts/pages
		term.class.php            SEO Bar assessments (title, description, indexing, etc.) for taxonomy terms

settings/
	listedit.class.php            Quick-edit and bulk-edit SEO fields in post/term list tables
	plugin.class.php              Builds the main SEO Settings admin page: metaboxes, columns, save handling
	post.class.php                Registers and renders the per-post SEO meta box on the post-edit screen
	term.class.php                Outputs SEO settings fields on the term-edit screen for supported taxonomies
	user.class.php                Outputs SEO-related profile fields (author info) on the user-edit screen
	layout/
		form.class.php            Generates HTML form elements (selects, qubit tri-state fields) for setting controls
		html.class.php            Reusable HTML layout primitives (headers, descriptions, attention marks) for setting pages
		input.class.php           Constructs input field markup (checkboxes, text fields, IDs/names) for edit screens


Data (inc/classes/data/)
------------------------
Data access layer: reading, saving, filtering, and sanitizing plugin options, post/term/user meta.

blog.class.php                  Blog/site data helpers (public blog name, site title)
plugin.class.php                Core data interface for TSF plugin options/settings and site cache storage
post.class.php                  Post data helpers (excerpts, content, timestamps)
term.class.php                  Term data helpers (latest term ID by taxonomy)
user.class.php                  User data helpers (capability checks, user data retrieval)

admin/
	plugin.class.php              Admin-side plugin settings registration, saving, and sanitization (register_setting)
	post.class.php                Admin-side post meta saving/sanitization with nonce handling (post/quick/bulk edit)
	term.class.php                Admin-side term meta saving/sanitization with nonce handling (term/quick edit)
	user.class.php                Admin-side user profile meta saving with nonce handling

filter/
	escape.class.php              Data escaping methods (option name attributes, JSON encoding for scripts)
	plugin.class.php              Plugin option sanitization/filter callbacks applied when settings are updated
	post.class.php                Post meta sanitization filters (title, description, canonical URI, robots fields)
	sanitize.class.php            General-purpose data sanitization (booleans, URLs, metadata content)
	term.class.php                Term meta sanitization filters (title, description, canonical, robots fields)
	user.class.php                User meta sanitization filters (social profiles, counter type, author slug)

plugin/
	deprecated.class.php          Retrieval and mapping of deprecated plugin options for backward compatibility
	helper.class.php              Small helper utilities for plugin data (e.g., robots option index key lookups)
	post.class.php                TSF-specific post meta data interface (get/save/delete meta, primary terms)
	pta.class.php                 Post Type Archive meta data interface for TSF settings per archive
	setup.class.php               Default plugin options/settings definitions and reset/initialization logic
	term.class.php                TSF-specific term meta data interface (get/save/delete term meta)
	user.class.php                TSF-specific user meta data interface (author meta, user options)


Front-end (inc/classes/front/)
------------------------------
Front-facing logic: meta tag output, feeds, redirects, and query modifications.

feed.class.php                  Modifies RSS feed content (excerpts, nofollow links), sets X-Robots-Tag noindex on feeds
oembed.class.php                Alters oEmbed response data to use SEO-optimized titles and images
query.class.php                 Modifies front-end WP_Query to exclude noindex/noarchive posts from search and archive results
redirect.class.php              Handles front-end 301 redirects based on per-post/term custom redirect URL meta
title.class.php                 Overwrites WordPress document title filters with the plugin's generated SEO title

meta/
	head.class.php                Orchestrates printing the SEO meta tag block (indicator wrap and tags) in wp_head
	tags.class.php                Interprets meta tag render data from PHP arrays into HTML output (tag builder/renderer)
	generator/
		advanced-query-protection.class.php   Generates the tsf:aqp meta tag for advanced query protection detection
		description.class.php                 Generates the <meta name="description"> tag
		facebook.class.php                    Generates Facebook article:author and article:publisher meta tags
		open-graph.class.php                  Generates Open Graph meta tags (type, locale, title, description, URL, image, times)
		robots.class.php                      Generates the <meta name="robots"> tag with computed directives
		schema.class.php                      Generates the JSON-LD Schema.org structured data script block
		theme-color.class.php                 Generates the <meta name="theme-color"> tag from plugin settings
		twitter.class.php                     Generates Twitter Card meta tags (card type, site, creator, title, description, image)
		uri.class.php                         Generates canonical URL, pagination rel-links (prev/next), and shortlink tags
		webmasters.class.php                  Generates site verification meta tags for Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu, Pinterest


Helper (inc/classes/helper/)
----------------------------
Shared utility classes used across admin and front contexts.

compatibility.class.php         Detects conflicting SEO plugins and displays admin warnings
guidelines.class.php            Locale-aware character/pixel length guidelines for title and description inputs
headers.class.php               HTTP response header utilities: output buffer cleanup and X-Robots-Tag noindex
migrate.class.php               Detects and transforms unprocessed syntax from other SEO plugins (Yoast, Rank Math, SEOPress)
post-type.class.php             Determines whether a post type is disabled, supported, or forced-supported for SEO
query.class.php                 Comprehensive WordPress query interpretation helpers (post type, ID resolution, archive/singular checks)
redirect.class.php              Filterable check for whether external 301 redirects are allowed
taxonomy.class.php              Determines whether a taxonomy is disabled, supported, or available for SEO
template.class.php              Secure view/template loader with secret token to prevent unauthorized inclusion

format/
	arrays.class.php              Array manipulation: list flattening, scrubbing, merging multidimensional arrays
	color.class.php               Calculates WCAG-compliant relative font colors from hex background colors
	html.class.php                HTML manipulation: stripping embed URLs, extracting content, making inline HTML
	markdown.class.php            Converts limited inline Markdown syntax (bold, links, code) to HTML
	minify.class.php              Rudimentary JS and CSS minification via string replacements (no AST parsing)
	strings.class.php             String utilities: truncation with ellipsis, cloning, batch replacement, text transforms
	time.class.php                Time/date formatting utilities for timestamps to ISO 8601 and other formats

query/
	cache.class.php               Memoization layer for query results respecting main query initialization state
	exclusion.class.php           Builds and caches lists of post IDs excluded from search/archives by per-post settings
	filter.class.php              Filters post permalink category links to use the primary term set via the plugin
	utils.class.php               Query utility checks: pretty permalinks, SEO support, taxonomy/post-type validation


Internal (inc/classes/internal/)
--------------------------------
Debug, deprecation, and infrastructure utilities.

debug.class.php                 Plugin debug utilities: deprecation notices, query state dumping, front-end debug output
deprecated.class.php            Empty container for removed deprecated tsf() methods
silencer.class.php              Singleton stub that absorbs method calls on soft-disabled/unavailable API pool classes


Meta (inc/classes/meta/)
------------------------
Meta tag value generators: title, description, robots, Schema.org, social, images, URIs.
These classes compute values; front/meta/generator/ classes render them into HTML.

breadcrumbs.class.php           Generates breadcrumb lists (URL + name pairs) for posts, terms, and post type archives
description.class.php           Builds meta description output from custom fields or auto-generated excerpts
facebook.class.php              Provides Facebook-specific meta values (author, publisher, app ID) for article pages
image.class.php                 Retrieves and manages SEO image URLs (custom and generated) for social/oembed
open-graph.class.php            Builds Open Graph meta tag values (type, title, description, URL, images, locale, site name)
robots.class.php                Public API for generating robots meta tag values and collecting assertions
schema.class.php                Assembles the Schema.org JSON-LD graph from registered entity builders
theme-color.class.php           Returns sanitized theme-color meta tag hex value from plugin options
title.class.php                 Builds meta/document title from custom fields or auto-generation with tagline/separator
twitter.class.php               Builds Twitter Card meta tag values (card type, site, creator, title, description, image) with OG fallback
uri.class.php                   Generates canonical, indexable, and bare permalink URLs with scheme/pagination handling

description/
	excerpt.class.php             Generates description excerpts from post/term/PTA/user content

image/
	generator.class.php           Yields image URLs and IDs from various sources (attachments, featured, content) via generators
	utils.class.php               Utility helpers for fetching image dimensions and metadata from attachments

robots/
	args.class.php                Robots directive generator driven by explicit query arguments (id/tax/pta/uid)
	factory.class.php             Abstract factory base for robots generators, holding shared state and generator logic
	front.class.php               Robots directive generator using the live front-end query context
	main.class.php                Singleton orchestrator dispatching to Args or Front generators, collects robots output

schema/entities/
	author.class.php              Schema.org Person entity representing a post's author
	breadcrumblist.class.php      Schema.org BreadcrumbList entity built from the Breadcrumbs class output
	organization.class.php        Schema.org Organization entity with name, URL, logo, and same-as links
	person.class.php              Schema.org Person entity representing the site owner
	reference.class.php           Abstract base providing @id generation and cross-referencing for Schema entities
	webpage.class.php             Schema.org WebPage entity with title, description, dates, breadcrumbs, author refs
	website.class.php             Schema.org WebSite entity with site name, URL, publisher, and sitelinks search

title/
	conditions.class.php          Conditional checks: protection-prefix usage, tagline addition, separator placement
	utils.class.php               Title utility helpers: separator list, separator retrieval, tagline resolution

uri/
	utils.class.php               URI utilities: scheme detection, URL appending/prepending, slash handling, permalink checks


Robots.txt (inc/classes/robotstxt/)
-----------------------------------
Virtual robots.txt generation.

main.class.php                  Generates virtual robots.txt output with prioritized directives (user-agents, sitemaps, rules)
utils.class.php                 Provides filterable lists of blockable user-agents (AI crawlers, SEO crawlers)


Sitemap (inc/classes/sitemap/)
------------------------------
XML sitemap generation with caching, locking, and WP Core sitemap augmentation.

cache.class.php                 Manages sitemap transient caching, per-blog/language cache keys, and cache clearing
cron.class.php                  Schedules WP-Cron single events for sitemap ping notifications
lock.class.php                  Locking mechanics to prevent concurrent sitemap generation; serves 503 when locked
registry.class.php              Registers sitemap endpoints, parses requests, dispatches sitemap output
utils.class.php                 Sitemap utilities: post query limits, URL exclusion checks, robots-based filtering

optimized/
	base.class.php                Generates the base (default) optimized sitemap XML with post/taxonomy URL building
	main.class.php                Abstract base for the optimized sitemap generator; handles memory limits and URL counting
	xsl.class.php                 Renders the XSL stylesheet for the optimized sitemap

wp/
	filter.class.php              Augments WP Core sitemap: sets TSF's "doing sitemap" state, filters query args
	posts.class.php               Extends WP_Sitemaps_Posts: adds TSF-based filtering (noindex, lastmod) to Core posts sitemap
	taxonomies.class.php          Extends WP_Sitemaps_Taxonomies: adds TSF-based filtering to Core taxonomies sitemap


Traits (inc/traits/)
--------------------
Shared trait files used across multiple classes.

property-refresher.trait.php    Registers automated static property flushing for multisite blog-switching scenarios

internal/
	static-deprecator.trait.php   Deprecation handling for static classes: intercepts calls to deprecated methods/properties


Functions (inc/functions/)
--------------------------
Global and namespaced function definitions.

api.php                         Defines global tsf() and the_seo_framework() factory functions plus namespaced helpers (memo, umemo, has_run)
deprecated.php                  Holds deprecated global API functions to prevent fatal errors; emptied after deprecation cycles
upgrade-suggestion.php          Shows a one-time admin notice suggesting the TSF Extension Manager plugin after upgrades


Compatibility (inc/compat/)
---------------------------
Theme and plugin compatibility shims loaded conditionally based on active themes/plugins.

plugin-bbpress.php              bbPress: overrides titles, robots, SEO columns, and archive queries on forum/topic/reply pages
plugin-buddypress.php           BuddyPress: disables Robots, URI, OG, Twitter, and Schema meta on BuddyPress pages
plugin-edd.php                  Easy Digital Downloads: registers download post type as product for is_product queries
plugin-elementor.php            Elementor: hides incorrectly-public post types from TSF, forces noindex on them
plugin-jetpack.php              Jetpack: disables its Open Graph and Twitter Card output when TSF's options are enabled
plugin-polylang.php             Polylang: per-language sitemaps, pll__ string translation, canonical URL and home URL fixes
plugin-ultimatemember.php       Ultimate Member: reinstates title support, conditionally disables SEO on profile pages
plugin-woocommerce.php          WooCommerce: shop page ID, product detection, noindex cart/checkout, primary term links, image params
plugin-wpforo.php               wpForo: page detection; defers to wpForo SEO when enabled or overrides with TSF's output
plugin-wpml.php                 WPML: per-language sitemaps, sitemap cache flushing, translatable post filtering
theme-avada.php                 Avada: disables conflicting Open Graph, rich snippets, and hides its SEO meta box tab
theme-bricks.php                Bricks Builder: removes non-public template post types/taxonomies from TSF's public lists
theme-genesis.php               Genesis: disables Genesis SEO features, migrates Genesis term meta into TSF's defaults


Views (inc/views/)
------------------
PHP view templates rendered by the admin settings and front-end output systems.

debug/
	header.php                    Debug panel showing expected/determined SEO meta tag output for the current page
	output.php                    Detailed debug info: query state, page type, ID, taxonomy, post type, generated meta values

list/
	bulk-post.php                 Bulk-edit fields (robots, canonical, redirect) for posts in admin list table
	quick-post.php                Quick-edit fields (robots, title, description, canonical, redirect) for posts
	quick-term.php                Quick-edit fields (robots, title, description, canonical, redirect) for terms

notice/
	persistent.php                Dismissible persistent admin notice with AJAX-powered dismiss button

post/
	gutenberg-data.php            Hidden data holder div with post ID for Gutenberg block editor integration
	homepage-warning.php          Warning that post SEO fields may be overridden by global Homepage Settings
	settings.php                  Full per-post SEO metabox content (title, description, social, visibility, robots, canonical, redirect tabs)
	wrap-content.php              Tab content panels for the flex-tab navigation in the post edit metabox
	wrap-nav.php                  Tab radio buttons/labels for the flex-tab navigation in the post edit metabox

profile/
	settings.php                  User profile SEO fields (Facebook URL, X/Twitter handle, author robots noindex/nofollow)

settings/
	columns.php                   Two-column metabox layout container for the main SEO Settings page
	notice.php                    Contextual admin notice (updated/unchanged/reset/error) after saving settings
	wrap.php                      Outer settings page wrapper: page title, form, submit/reset buttons, extensions link
	wrap-content.php              Tab content panels for the navigation wrapper in settings metaboxes
	wrap-nav.php                  Tab radio buttons/labels for the settings metabox tab wrapper
	metaboxes/
		description.php           Settings metabox: automated meta description generation behavior
		feed.php                  Settings metabox: RSS/Atom feed options (excerpt conversion, source backlinks)
		general.php               Settings metabox: general plugin options (layout, performance, canonical, timestamps, exclusions)
		homepage.php              Settings metabox: homepage SEO (title, description, social, robots, social images)
		post-type-archive.php     Settings metabox: post type archive SEO (title, description, social, visibility)
		robots.php                Settings metabox: global robots/indexing directives per post type, taxonomy, archive type
		schema.php                Settings metabox: Schema.org structured data output (presence, sitelinks)
		sitemaps.php              Settings metabox: XML sitemap configuration (general, robots.txt, metadata, style)
		social.php                Settings metabox: social meta tags (Open Graph, Twitter Cards, oEmbed, profiles)
		title.php                 Settings metabox: title tag behavior (additions, separator, prefix, capitalization)
		webmaster.php             Settings metabox: webmaster verification codes (Google, Bing, Yandex, Baidu, Pinterest)

sitemap/
	xml-sitemap.php               Generates and outputs the full XML sitemap document (header, urlset, URLs, debug stats)
	xsl-stylesheet.php            Outputs the XSL stylesheet document for browser-rendered sitemap display
	xsl/
		description.php           XSL sitemap page: description/header section (logo, site title, text)
		footer.php                XSL sitemap page: footer with "Generated by The SEO Framework" credit
		styles.php                XSL sitemap page: inline CSS styles
		table.php                 XSL sitemap page: data table template (URL, last updated, priority columns)
		title.php                 XSL sitemap page: <title> element
		vars.php                  XSL sitemap page: variables (table width, colors, logo pixel size)

templates/
	inpost/
		primary-term-selector.php   JS template for primary term selector hidden input on the post edit screen
	list/
		primary-term-selector.php   JS templates for primary term selector dropdowns in quick/bulk edit views
	settings/
		warnings.php                JS templates for contextual warning tooltips on the settings page

term/
	settings.php                  Full per-term SEO settings fields (title, description, social, visibility, robots, canonical, redirect)


JavaScript (lib/js/)
--------------------
Client-side scripts for admin interfaces. Each .js file has a corresponding .min.js minified version.

authorslugs.js                  Author slug fetching and caching via REST API
ays.js                          "Are You Sure" unsaved-changes detection for settings pages
c.js                            Pixel and character counters for SEO input fields
canonical.js                    Canonical URL field tracking and prediction
description.js                  Meta description field handling and live previews
gbc.js                          Gutenberg block editor forwards-compatibility shim
le.js                           List Edit (quick/bulk edit) SEO field adjustments
media.js                        Image selection, cropping, and media modal integration
post.js                         Post editor SEO settings panel logic
postslugs.js                    Post slug fetching and caching via REST API
pt.js                           Primary Term selection for the classic editor
pt-gb.js                        Primary Term selection for the Gutenberg block editor
pt-le.js                        Primary Term selection in List Edit (quick/bulk edit)
settings.js                     Global SEO Settings admin page logic
social.js                       Social (Open Graph / Twitter) meta input field handling
tabs.js                         UI tab navigation component (no jQuery)
term.js                         Term (taxonomy) editor SEO settings logic
termslugs.js                    Term slug fetching and caching via REST API
title.js                        Meta title field handling, live previews, and additions
tsf.js                          Core TSF JS library: shared utilities, state, and initialization
tt.js                           Tooltip system for on-hover info balloons
ui.js                           General UI helpers (postbox toggles, dismiss notices)
utils.js                        Utility functions (debounce, etc.)


CSS (lib/css/)
--------------
Stylesheets for admin interfaces. Each .css file has a corresponding .min.css minified version.

le.css                          Styles for quick/bulk edit SEO columns and inline inputs
media.css                       Styles for image selection buttons, previews, and warnings
post.css                        Styles for the post editor SEO meta box (classic + block editor)
pt.css                          Styles for the primary term selector dropdowns
settings.css                    Styles for the SEO Settings admin page layout
term.css                        Styles for the term editor SEO meta fields
tsf.css                         Core shared styles (title wraps, offsets, JS visibility toggles)
tsfc.css                        Character/pixel counter indicator styles (good/okay/bad colors)
tt.css                          Tooltip positioning and balloon appearance styles
ui.css                          Dismissible admin notice and icon styles


Language (language/)
--------------------
Translation files for internationalization.

autodescription.pot              POT translation template for the autodescription text domain
